blockedAssertions.blockedBy: OpenAI API key quota exceeded (429 error). The AI categorization feature code is implemented and correctly calls GPT-4o-mini, but the API key has exceeded its billing quota. The categorize endpoint properly handles the error (shows user-friendly message, transactions preserved, retry available). Merchant rule-based categorization works correctly as a fallback path. This is an external dependency issue, not a code issue.
